[ch]Cm[/ch] 

[Verse 1]

[tab]        [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]
Leaving fear behind [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb/C[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
Billy, Billy don't you lose [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db[/ch]     [ch]Dbadd9[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
My number. [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch] 
Cuz you're not anywhere,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]
Where I can find you. Oh![/tab]

[Verse 2](same chords):
Searching through the day 
And into the night, they 
Never stopped til they found 
Him.
They didn't know him and they
Didn't understand, They never 
Asked him why.
Get out of my way! I heard him
Shout, and a blinding light.
All I could see was him running
Down the street, out of the 
Shadows and into the light.

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
